title: potentilla reptans f. aurantiaca
intro: Potentilla reptans f. aurantiaca, also known as orange creeping cinquefoil or golden creeping cinquefoil, is a variety of the Potentilla reptans plant, a perennial herb belonging to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The medicinal properties of Potentilla reptans f. aurantiaca are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
